---
title: "09. 知足与限度"
subtitle: "Sufficiency, Limits, and Knowing When to Stop"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 9
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 9, 12, 24, 29, 32, 33, 44, 46, 47, 71, 77, and 81 map self-limitation and sufficiency onto No11 stopping rules, Zeckendorf optimality, and rate-distortion bounds."
---

**Chapters:** 9, 12, 24, 29, 32, 33, 44, 46, 47, 71, 77, 81  
**Omega Directions:** `golden-mean shift`, `Zeckendorf representation`, `rate-distortion`

{{< include articles/category_09_sufficiency_limits.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## Video & Media

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_09_sufficiency_limits_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_09_sufficiency_limits_slides.pdf)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_09_sufficiency_limits_video.mp4)
- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_09_sufficiency_limits_infographic.png)
